title: Garlicky Creamy Show-off British Pork Belly Stir-fry
description: This vegan-friendly stir-fry showcases the richness of creamy sauces with a twist of garlic and hints of savory spices to complement the tender texture of baked pork belly.

ingredients.name: 1 cup cashew pieces
ingredients.notes: ensure they are soaked and drained for at least an hour

instructions: Place the cashew pieces in a shallow baking dish, drizzle with olive oil, salt, and freshly ground black pepper. Bake for about 25 minutes or until golden brown.
While the cashews are baking, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add soy sauce to the pan and stir continuously until it starts to reduce slightly, adding lemon juice once reduced by half.
Fold in baked cashew pieces, vegan cream, and fresh parsley. Stir gently, allowing the mixture to heat through without letting it boil.
Season with salt and pepper if needed and serve hot.
